# 🎨 UNIDRAW Frontend

Beautiful collaborative drawing interface built with HTML5 Canvas, Socket.io, and Tailwind CSS.

## Features

- Real-time canvas drawing with WebSocket
- Professional UI/UX with Bodoni Moda + Inter fonts
- Responsive design (desktop & mobile)
- Live collaborator tracking
- Beautiful animations and hover effects
- Masonry gallery showcase
- Feature cards with interactions

## Quick Start

```bash
npm run dev
